query:
You are a competitive intelligence analyst building a deep benchmark profile of Freebe (https://freebe.me/).

Search https://freebe.me/, https://freebe.me//pricing, https://freebe.me//plans, Crunchbase, LinkedIn, G2, Capterra, TechCrunch, and recent news. Run several searches with adjacent keywords to ensure full breadth.

Extract the following — include a source URL for each section:

PRICING: Visit https://freebe.me//pricing and https://freebe.me//plans. List every plan name, exact monthly USD price, exact annual USD price, free tier availability (true/false), any recent pricing changes.

FUNDING: Search Crunchbase and news for 'Freebe funding'. Extract: funding stage, latest round amount USD, round date (YYYY-MM-DD), round type (Seed/Series A/B/C/etc), total raised USD, all investor names.

COMPANY: Find the LinkedIn company page URL for Freebe. Extract current employee count. Note any headcount growth signals from LinkedIn or news.

FOUNDERS: Find CEO and founder names for Freebe. Extract their LinkedIn profile URLs. Search for recent LinkedIn posts or press statements from founders (last 6 months) — extract the key signal or quote for each.

SIGNALS: Search news and press from the last 6 months about Freebe. For each item extract: date, headline, signal type (funding/product/hiring/partnership/press), source URL.

POSITIONING: List key differentiators of Freebe vs alternatives. Identify primary target customer segment. List up to 5 publicly known customer names.

WEAKNESSES: Search G2, Capterra, Reddit, Hacker News for user complaints or limitations of Freebe. List the most recurring themes.
answer:
**Executive Summary**

Freebe is a Paris-based, cloud-native business management and invoicing SaaS tailored for French freelancers, micro-entrepreneurs, and small businesses. Founded by Antoine Legendre, the company operates with a lean team and focuses on automating low-value administrative tasks such as VAT management and bank synchronization. Recently, Freebe has shifted its product strategy by expanding its addressable market to include formal corporate entities (SASU, SARL, etc.) as of October 2024, while relying heavily on strategic partnerships to drive growth.

---

### Company & Leadership

*   **Headquarters & Founding**: Freebe is headquartered in Paris, France, and was founded in 2017/2018 after 18 months of R&D, officially launching in July 2018 [[Freebe - 2026 Company Profile, Team, Funding & Competitors - Tracxn](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/freebe/__VdsN-sBE_PyalA61iNrxfdVZGa_dvimxwkEJZZfsB94); [Freebe, un logiciel qui veut soulager tous les freelances de leurs soucis administratifs](https://www.maddyness.com/2018/08/08/freebe-freelance-administratif/)].
*   **Headcount**: As of April 30, 2026, Freebe operates with a lean team of 7 employees [[Freebe - 2026 Company Profile, Team, Funding & Competitors - Tracxn](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/freebe/__VdsN-sBE_PyalA61iNrxfdVZGa_dvimxwkEJZZfsB94)]. The company maintains an active LinkedIn presence with 2,342 followers at [https://fr.linkedin.com/company/freebe.me](https://fr.linkedin.com/company/freebe.me) [[Freebe | LinkedIn](https://fr.linkedin.com/company/freebe.me)].
*   **Founder & CEO**: Antoine Legendre (LinkedIn: [https://www.linkedin.com/in/designer-ux/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/designer-ux/)) is the sole identified founder and CEO [[Antoine Legendre - Freebe | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/designer-ux/)]. A former UX/UI designer, Legendre positions himself as a "doctor of administrative phobia," stating the platform was built to automate low-value tasks so freelancers can focus on their core business [[Freebe | LinkedIn](https://fr.linkedin.com/company/freebe.me); [[Podcast] : Le Docteur en phobie administrative (avec Antoine, Freebe) - Bien dans ta Boite](https://biendanstaboite.fr/le-docteur-en-phobie-administrative-antoine-freebe/)].
*   **Recent Founder Signals (Last 6 Months)**: In early 2026, Legendre published several thought-leadership guides aimed at his target market, including "ACRE 2026: tout ce qui change pour les créateurs d'entreprise" and "Comment faire sa première facture en freelance en 2026?" [[Freebe](https://www.freebe.me/)]. On February 2, 2026, he published a blog post titled "Micro-entreprise vs société : quel statut choisir en 2026?" [[Bienvenue sur le Blog du Freelance - Freebe](https://www.freebe.me/blog)].

### Pricing & Packaging

Freebe utilizes a tiered pricing model based on the user's legal business structure. Subscriptions are non-binding ("sans engagement") and billed in advance via Stripe or GoCardless [[Conditions Générales d'Utilisation (CGU) - Freebe](https://www.freebe.me/cgu); [Combien coûte Freebe ? Nos tarifs clairs 2026 - Saask](https://saask.fr/softwares/freebe/prix/)]. *(Note: All pricing is reported in Euros as USD pricing is not publicly available for this France-centric tool).*

**Current Plans & Pricing:**
*   **Micro-entrepreneurs**: 15 € TTC/month | 40 € TTC/quarter | 150 € TTC/year [[Une offre adaptée aux freelances - Freebe.me](https://freebe.me/tarifs)].
*   **Groupement d'Intérêt Économique (GIE)**: 16 € HT/month | 41 € HT/quarter | 150 € HT/year [[Une offre adaptée aux freelances - Freebe.me](https://freebe.me/tarifs)].
*   **Entreprise Individuelle (EI)**: 25 € HT/month | 70 € HT/quarter | 250 € HT/year [[Une offre adaptée aux freelances - Freebe.me](https://freebe.me/tarifs)].
*   **SASU, SAS, EURL, SARL**: 45 € HT/month | 120 € HT/quarter | 450 € HT/year [[Une offre adaptée aux freelances - Freebe.me](https://freebe.me/tarifs)].

**Trials, Discounts, and Free Tiers:**
*   **Free Trial**: A standard 30-day free trial is available with no credit card required, granting 100% feature access [[Combien coûte Freebe ? Nos tarifs clairs 2026 - Saask](https://saask.fr/softwares/freebe/prix/)].
*   **Free Tier Availability**: **False** (with contradictions). While one source claims a limited free version exists, the consensus indicates there is no permanent free tier and a paid subscription is mandatory post-trial [[Freebe: Avis Prix & Alternatives | Logiciels.Pro](https://www.logiciels.pro/logiciel-saas/freebe/)].
*   **Discounts**: Users can access a 60-day trial using code 'INDE60' or a 20% discount with 'INDE20' [[Avis Freebe | Le meilleur logiciel de gestion pour auto-entrepreneur ?](https://independant.io/avis/freebe/)]. A partner platform ('Secret') offers a 50% discount on annual plans, saving users up to $42 [[Code Promo Freebe: 50% de réduction sur l'abonnement annuel - mars 2026 | Secret](https://www.joinsecret.com/fr/freebe)].

### Product Positioning & Market Signals

*   **Target Segment**: Originally built exclusively for freelancers and micro-entrepreneurs, Freebe executed a major market expansion in October 2024 to support formal corporate entities (EI, EURL, SARL, SASU, SAS) [[Notre Avis sur Freebe : Analyse et Test Complet (MAJ 2026)](https://tool-advisor.fr/logiciel-facturation/comparatif/freebe/)]. 
*   **Differentiators**: Freebe positions itself as a "made in France" solution that heavily automates administrative burdens, specifically time-tracking, French VAT management, and bank synchronization [[Freebe | LinkedIn](https://fr.linkedin.com/company/freebe.me)].
*   **Recent Signals & Partnerships**: 
    *   *Partnership*: Partnered with "Les Nouvelles Recrues" (a collective of independent recruiters) to help users source clients [[Les Nouvelles Recrues, collectif de recruteurs indépendants](https://www.freebe.me/blog/les-nouvelles-recrues-collectif-de-recruteurs-independants)].
    *   *Partnership*: Secured a recommendation partnership with "Happy Recruteur" [[Happy Recruteur recommande Freebe.me pour piloter son ...](https://www.freebe.me/partenaire/happy-recruteur)].
    *   *Product/Platform*: The dedicated mobile application was discontinued in 2023 in favor of a 100% responsive mobile web platform [[Une offre adaptée aux freelances - Freebe.me](https://www.freebe.me/tarifs)]. *(Note: Another source claims they recently launched a mobile app for receipt management, indicating a potential pivot back to native mobile or conflicting market data [[Avis Freebe 2026 : Test complet freelances](https://freelancekit.fr/avis/freebe)])*.

### Funding & Financials

Freebe's funding history contains conflicting reports across major databases, suggesting the company is either bootstrapped or operating on minimal early-stage capital:
*   **Tracxn Data**: Reports Freebe has completed one funding round with a single institutional investor, *Le Village by CA*. The round date, type, and amount are undisclosed [[Freebe - 2026 Company Profile, Team, Funding & Competitors - Tracxn](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/freebe/__VdsN-sBE_PyalA61iNrxfdVZGa_dvimxwkEJZZfsB94)].
*   **Annuaire Startups Data**: Explicitly states Freebe has *not* realized any fundraising rounds [[FREEBE Start-up Logiciels SAAS à Paris: Levées de fonds](https://www.annuaire-startups.pro/startup/freebe/)].
*   **Capital**: The company has a registered capital of 16.7 K€ [[Startup FREEEBE,Solution de gestion simple dédié aux indépendants](https://www.myfrenchstartup.com/fr/startup-france/236575/freeebe)].

---

### Gaps and Limitations

Based on the provided research findings, the following requested data points could not be fulfilled:
1.  **USD Pricing**: Exact monthly and annual USD prices are unavailable. Because Freebe targets the French market, pricing is exclusively listed in Euros (€).
2.  **Customer Names**: No publicly known customer names (up to 5) were identified in the provided text.
3.  **Weaknesses/Complaints**: No user complaints, limitations, or recurring negative themes from G2, Capterra, Reddit, or Hacker News were present in the findings.
4.  **Funding Specifics**: The exact funding round amount, round date (YYYY-MM-DD), round type, and total raised USD are unavailable due to non-disclosure and conflicting database reports. *(Note: Crunchbase data showing $461.6M raised belongs to an unrelated Nigerian entity named "Freebe Technology Solutions").*
